where.if: AND ( CAST(id AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{idToken}, '%') OR LOWER(COALESCE(plan_uuid,'')) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{idToken}), '%') )

if.test: paymentPlatform != null and paymentPlatform != '' and paymentPlatform != 'all'

mapper.select: SELECT * FROM recharge_plans WHERE status = 'active' ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recharge_plans ( name, bean_count, extra_bean, amount, recharge_info, pay_platform, currency, status, description, unlock_full_series, plan_uuid, created_by, created_by_name, is_recommended, is_hot, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{beanCount}, #{extraBean}, #{amount}, #{rechargeInfo}, #{payPlatform}, #{currency}, #{status}, #{description}, #{unlockFullSeries}, #{planUuid}, #{createdBy}, #{createdByName}, #{isRecommended}, #{isHot}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE recharge_plans SET name = #{name}, bean_count = #{beanCount}, extra_bean = #{extraBean}, amount = #{amount}, recharge_info = #{rechargeInfo}, pay_platform = #{payPlatform}, currency = #{currency}, status = #{status}, description = #{description}, unlock_full_series = #{unlockFullSeries}, plan_uuid = #{planUuid}, created_by_name = #{createdByName}, is_recommended = #{isRecommended}, is_hot = #{isHot}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
